name: cybersecurity-team
description: Full-spectrum offensive security team. 12 specialized agents covering recon, OSINT/dorking, automated scanning, web exploitation, Active Directory attack chains, cloud identity attacks (Entra ID/Azure/AWS), privilege escalation (Windows + Linux), RCE hunting, post-exploitation, vulnerability research, and professional reporting. High-stakes agents use Opus; pattern-based/documentation agents use Haiku or Sonnet.
